data.title: TAO and Arbitrum investors rush to buy into 1Fuel presale before anticipated rally
data.description:
For years, Arbitrum and TAO have dominated the market as two of the best altcoins for investors. However, after the recent sell-offs, many investors are shifting their attention to 1Fuel, a revolutionary newcomer that has already raised over $2 million via its ongoing presale. Read on to discover why a growing number of analysts believe […]
The post TAO and Arbitrum investors rush to buy into...
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/tao-and-arbitrum-investors-rush-to-buy-into-1fuel-presale-before-anticipated-rally/

data.title: Defi.App Completes $4 Million Funding, Mechanism Capital Leads Investment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DeFi trading platform Defi.App announced that it has completed $4 million in financing, of which venture capital institutions contributed $2 million, led by Mechanism Capital, DCF Capital Partners, Balaji Srinivasan and Pentoshi. It is reported that later this month, Defi.App plans to conduct a public token sale to non-US KYC users. (TheBlock)

data.title: doodles announces the launch of its official token $DOOD
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: NFT project doodles announced the launch of its official token $DOOD on the X platform. The token will be launched on Solana with a supply of 10,000,000,000. In the future, a bridge will be established with Base, and 68% will be allocated to the community.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 670 USDT with a Narrowed 0.57% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2025, 16:53 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 670 USDT and is now trading at 669.47998 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.57% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: TST Experiences Significant Price Drop
data.description: According to Odaily, the cryptocurrency TST has experienced a sharp decline, briefly falling below 0.1 USDT. It is currently trading at 0.1343 USDT, marking a 24-hour decrease of 29.09%.

data.title: TST fell below 0.1 USDT in the short term, with a 24-hour drop of 29.09%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News shows that TST fell below 0.1 USDT in the short term and is currently trading at 0.1343 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 29.09%.

data.title: A trader spent 1 BNB to buy Broccoli and got a return of 9900 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a trader spent 1 BNB (US$707) to buy Meme coin Broccoli, and currently has a profit of US$7 million, with a return of 9,900 times.

data.title: Framework Ventures leads $20 million Series A for stablecoin firm Plasma
data.description:
The firm plans to use its funding to continue developing the Plasma blockchain, which is an EVM-compatible Bitcoin sidechain to facilitate USDT transfers with no fees.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/340726/framework-ventures-leads-20-million-series-a-for-stablecoin-firm-plasma?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Confirmed As U.S. Health Secretary
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Senate has voted to confirm Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as the Secretary of Health. Previously a presidential candidate, Kennedy is known for his favorable stance towards cryptocurrency. He has disclosed owning at least $1 million in Bitcoin and has no plans to divest from this asset.

data.title: US Senate votes to confirm crypto-friendly Robert Kennedy Jr. as Surgeon General
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Senate voted to confirm Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as Secretary of Health. (Jinshi) Robert Kennedy Jr., a former U.S. presidential candidate and crypto-friendly person, disclosed that he holds at least $1 million in Bitcoin and has no plans to divest the assets.
